todo-api/src/main/java/lol/maki/dev/todo.general_idea: Replace the mutable class with a Java record to leverage modern language features for immutable data carriers.
todo-api/src/main/java/lol/maki/dev/todo.human_impl: public record Todo(String todoId, String todoTitle, boolean finished, Instant createdAt, String createdBy, Instant updatedAt, String updatedBy)

todo-api/src/main/java/lol/maki/dev/todo.general_idea: Introduce the Jilt library to generate builder patterns for the new record, as records do not support builders natively.
Delete explicit getter and setter methods that are now implicitly provided by the record definition.
Remove the serialVersionUID field which is typically unnecessary for records unless specific serialization compatibility is required.
todo-api/src/main/java/lol/maki/dev/todo.human_impl: Removed private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;

todo-api/src/main/java/lol/maki/dev/todo.general_idea: Inject IdGenerator to replace manual UUID generation for creating unique identifiers.
Inject Clock to replace Instant.now() for testable time handling.
Replace UUID.randomUUID() with injected IdGenerator for consistent ID creation.
Replace Instant.now() with injected Clock.instant() for deterministic time.
Switch from JWT subject to email claim for user identification.
Throw ResponseStatusException instead of returning empty Optional for missing resources.
Change update endpoint from PUT to PATCH to support partial updates.
Implement partial update logic that only modifies fields present in the request body.
Update code to use record accessor methods instead of bean getters/setters.
Use TodoBuilder to construct and modify Todo records instead of direct setter calls.
Update repository calls to use standard Spring Data methods like save and findById.
Explicitly define path attribute in RequestMapping annotation.
Remove CrossOrigin annotation, likely relying on global CORS configuration instead.
Organize imports and remove unused UUID import.
Replaced @Repository with @Component to align with standard Spring component scanning practices.
Expanded wildcard import java.util.* into explicit imports for better code clarity.
todo-api/src/main/java/lol/maki/dev/todo.human_impl: import java.util.* -> import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.Collections; ...

todo-api/src/main/java/lol/maki/dev/todo.general_idea: Merged create and updateById methods into a single save method to simplify the repository interface.
Updated field access from getter method to direct accessor, implying Todo is now a Java Record.
Changed indentation style from spaces to tabs to match project coding standards.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.3.0.RELEASE to 3.4.0-RC1 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the project's Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Replace the deprecated spring-security-oauth2-autoconfigure with the modern spring-boot-starter-oauth2-authorization-server.
Add explicit spring-boot-starter-security dependency required by Spring Boot 3 authorization server setup.
Switch template engine from Thymeleaf to Mustache, likely to align with Spring Authorization Server reference implementation.
Update tracing dependencies from spring-cloud-starter-zipkin to micrometer-tracing-bridge-brave and zipkin-reporter-brave for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Add access-logger-logbook dependency for HTTP request/response logging.
Add spring-boot-docker-compose dependency to support Docker Compose integration in Spring Boot 3.
Add spring-boot-testcontainers and testcontainers junit-jupiter dependencies for modern containerized testing.
Add spring-security-test dependency for testing security configurations.
Add GraalVM native-maven-plugin to support building native images.
Add cyclonedx-maven-plugin for generating Software Bill of Materials (SBOM).
Add spring-javaformat-maven-plugin to enforce code formatting standards.
Add Spring Milestones repository to resolve pre-release dependencies like Spring Boot 3.4.0-RC1.
Remove spring-cloud-dependencies BOM as Spring Cloud integration is replaced by Micrometer Tracing.
Remove junit-vintage-engine exclusion as it is no longer included by default in Spring Boot 3 test starters.
Remove spring-boot-devtools dependency, possibly due to compatibility issues or preference for other hot-reload mechanisms.
Update project description and add empty license/developer/scm blocks to comply with Maven best practices or CI requirements.

todo-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.3.0.RELEASE to 3.4.0-RC1 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 to ensure the build targets the correct JDK.
Remove the Spring Cloud dependency management BOM as it is no longer used or compatible with the new setup.
Replace the deprecated spring-cloud-starter-zipkin with explicit Micrometer Tracing and Zipkin Reporter dependencies.
todo-api/pom.xml.human_impl: Added micrometer-tracing-bridge-brave and zipkin-reporter-brave, removed spring-cloud-starter-zipkin

todo-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Spring Security starter dependency which was likely implicit or handled differently before.
Add the access-logger-logbook library for HTTP request/response logging.
Add the Jilt library for method-level caching annotations.
Add the Spring Boot Docker Compose support dependency for local development.
Add Spring Boot Testcontainers support for integration testing.
Add Spring Security Test support for testing security configurations.
Add Testcontainers JUnit Jupiter support for integration testing.
Remove the exclusion of JUnit Vintage engine as it is no longer needed or present in the new starter.
todo-api/pom.xml.human_impl: Removed <exclusions> block for junit-vintage-engine from spring-boot-starter-test

todo-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Add the GraalVM Native Maven plugin to support building native images.
Add the CycloneDX Maven plugin for generating Software Bill of Materials (SBOM).
Add the Spring Java Format Maven plugin to enforce code formatting standards.
Add the Spring Milestones repository to resolve the RC version of Spring Boot.
Correct the groupId from lol.maki.dev.todo to lol.maki.dev to match standard conventions.
Update the project description to be more concise.
Add empty metadata sections for licenses, developers, and SCM to comply with Maven best practices.

.gitignore.general_idea: Corrected the path for the help file to match the project root structure.
Updated Maven target exclusion rules to specifically ignore target directories within source folders rather than all source files.
Updated Maven test target exclusion rules to specifically ignore target directories within test source folders.
Added exclusion rules for Gradle build directories within source and test folders to prevent accidental commits.
Added application default properties to gitignore to prevent committing local configuration overrides.
Added pattern to ignore specific migration SQL files likely generated during the Java version upgrade process.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper version to 3.3.2 to support modern Maven features and compatibility.
Upgrade the bundled Maven distribution from 3.6.3 to 3.9.9 to align with current standards.
Change the distribution type to 'only-script' to reduce download size and complexity.

README.md.general_idea: Replace outdated curl-based API testing instructions with modern Spring Boot 2024 edition setup and usage guide.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced curl commands with `./mvnw` run instructions and added screenshots for the new UI-based workflow.

authorization/.gitignore.general_idea: Refine .gitignore to explicitly exclude nested target and build directories within source and test folders to prevent accidental inclusion of generated artifacts.

authorization/.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper version to 3.3.2 to align with modern tooling standards.
Upgrade the managed Maven distribution from 3.6.3 to 3.9.9 to ensure compatibility with Java 21.
Configure the wrapper to download only the script distribution to reduce download size.

authorization/README.md.general_idea: Replace outdated Spring Security documentation link with concrete setup instructions for generating keys and running a Dex OIDC provider.
authorization/README.md.human_impl: Replaced single URL line with shell scripts for `openssl` key generation and `docker run` command for Dex.

authorization/mvnw.general_idea: Changed the Apache License URL from HTTPS to HTTP in the script header.
Replaced the legacy Maven Wrapper startup script with the modern version 3.3.2, which includes native platform detection, SHA-256 validation, and improved download logic.
authorization/mvnw.human_impl: Replaced entire script body with 'Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.3.2' implementation
